2606.13189.title: SICI: A Semantic-Pragmatic Complexity Index Reveals Regime Shifts in LLM Stance Detection
2606.13189.paper_summary: Prompt-based LLMs are increasingly used for stance detection, but harder examples are not always repaired by clearer instructions, reasoning prompts, retrieval, or debate. We introduce SICI (Stance Inference Complexity Index), a seven-dimensional diagnostic measure of the semantic-pragmatic burden imposed by a target--text pair. Across SemEval-2016 and VAST, SICI predicts LLM accuracy better than surface proxies and shows substantial cross-scorer reliability ($α=0.771$). More importantly, LLM errors change regime as SICI increases: low-complexity examples invite over-attribution, especially Against predictions; intermediate examples form an unstable boundary; and high-complexity examples rapidly concentrate on None. This phase-transition-like structure persists across GPT-3.5, GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-V3, and GPT-4o, although stronger models move the boundaries. A 15-method intervention study further shows that prompting, retrieval, and debate often shift models along the attribution--abstention axis rather than removing the high-complexity bottleneck.
2606.13189.paper_summary_zh: 基於提示的LLM越來越多地用於立場檢測，但更困難的例子並不總是通過更清晰的指示、推理提示、檢索或辯論來修正。我們引入了SICI（立場推斷複雜性指數），這是一個七維的診斷測量，評估目標文本對的語義-語用負擔。在SemEval-2016和VAST中，SICI比表面代理更好地預測LLM的準確性，並顯示出顯著的跨評分者可靠性（$α=0.771$）。更重要的是，隨著SICI的增加，LLM的錯誤模式發生變化：低複雜度的例子會引發過度歸因，特別是在反對預測中；中等複雜度的例子形成不穩定的邊界；而高複雜度的例子則迅速集中在無。這種類似相變的結構在GPT-3.5、GPT-4o-mini、DeepSeek-V3和GPT-4o中持續存在，儘管更強的模型會移動邊界。一項15種方法的干預研究進一步顯示，提示、檢索和辯論通常沿著歸因-放棄軸移動模型，而不是消除高複雜度的瓶頸。
2606.13189.author: Fuqiang Niu et.al.
